# fast_qr-generated fixtures

These PNGs were generated once from the sibling `/home/debian/codes/fast_qr` workspace using `fast_qr_reworked::QRBuilder` with forced QR mode, error-correction level, version, and mask.

Runtime tests in `rxing-reader/tests/qr_decode.rs` depend only on these checked-in PNG files and their expected metadata table; they do not depend on `fast_qr`.

Generation settings: quiet-zone margin 4 modules, scale 4 pixels per module, 8-bit grayscale PNG.
